cit.basis: Flat 24% corporate income tax under the Income Tax Act 1967, administered by the Inland Revenue Board of Malaysia (LHDN).

sme_regime.eligibility: Resident company, paid-up ordinary share capital <= RM2,500,000, gross business income <= RM50,000,000, and not part of a large group (no direct/indirect control links with a company exceeding the capital threshold).

brackets.note: Chargeable income from RM150,001 to RM600,000.

cit.note: SME/MSME tiered rates apply per year of assessment; incentive/pioneer-status rates are out of scope for this SME estimator.

wht.note: Domestic withholding tax rates on payments to non-residents (Income Tax Act 1967); tax treaties may reduce these.

sales_tax.note: Sales Tax on manufactured and imported goods: 5% reduced rate for specified goods, 10% standard rate.

service_tax.note: Service Tax raised from 6% to 8% on 1 March 2024; the 6% rate is retained for food & beverage, telecommunications, parking, and logistics services.

sst.note: Malaysia applies the Sales and Service Tax (SST), not VAT/GST.

vat.note: No VAT. GST was repealed in 2018 and replaced by the two-tier SST (sales tax + service tax).

official_sources.name: Lembaga Hasil Dalam Negeri Malaysia (Inland Revenue Board of Malaysia, LHDN)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
SME eligibility, incentives, WHT, treaty relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official LHDN guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
